name: @interligens/widget
description: Embeddable TigerScore widget for INTERLIGENS partners

scripts.build: tsup src/InterligensWidget.tsx src/embed.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --external react --out-dir dist
scripts.build:embed: tsup src/embed.ts --format iife --global-name InterligensEmbed --out-dir dist --out-file embed.js
scripts.dev: tsup src/InterligensWidget.tsx src/embed.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --external react --out-dir dist --watch
